class.name: DWM
class.brief_description: Provides Windows Desktop Window Manager (DWM) integration for Godot windows.
class.description: The [DWM] class exposes Windows DWM APIs for native decoration colors, dark mode, frame extension, Mica/Acrylic system backdrops, DWM timing data, and lower-level window attributes. This class is Windows-only. Most methods require a visible [Window] with native decorations.

link.title: Custom Window Title Bars in Godot

method.name: enable_dark_mode
method.description: Enables or disables immersive dark mode for the native window frame.

method.name: enable_hostbackdropbrush
method.description: Sets [constant ATTR_USE_HOSTBACKDROPBRUSH] for the window.

method.name: enable_mmcss
method.description: Enables or disables DWM participation in MMCSS scheduling for the current process.

method.name: extend_frame_into_client_area
method.description: Calls [code]DwmExtendFrameIntoClientArea[/code] with the supplied margins. Use [code]-1[/code] margins for the sheet-of-glass effect.

method.name: force_disable_transitions
method.description: Sets [constant ATTR_TRANSITIONS_FORCEDISABLED]. Returns [code]true[/code] when DWM accepts the attribute.

method.name: get_border_color
method.description: Returns the native border color.

method.name: get_caption_button_bounds
method.description: Returns [constant ATTR_CAPTION_BUTTON_BOUNDS] in screen coordinates.

method.name: get_colorization_color
method.description: Returns the user's global DWM colorization color.

method.name: get_composition_timing_info
method.description: Returns DWM composition timing counters and rates for debugging and performance monitoring.

method.name: get_native_window_handle
method.description: Returns the raw HWND value as an integer, or [code]0[/code] when unavailable.

method.name: get_title_bar_color
method.description: Returns the native caption color.

method.name: get_title_bar_text_color
method.description: Returns the native caption text color.

method.name: get_visible_frame_border_thickness
method.description: Returns [constant ATTR_VISIBLE_FRAME_BORDER_THICKNESS].

method.name: get_window_attribute_bool
method.description: Reads a BOOL-sized DWM window attribute.

method.name: get_window_attribute_color
method.description: Reads a COLORREF-sized DWM window attribute.

method.name: get_window_attribute_int
method.description: Reads a DWORD/int-sized DWM window attribute.

method.name: get_window_attribute_rect
method.description: Reads a RECT-sized DWM window attribute and returns it as [Rect2i].

method.name: get_window_bounds
method.description: Returns the extended DWM frame bounds when [param extended_frame] is [code]true[/code], otherwise the Win32 window rect.

method.name: get_window_corner_preference
method.description: Returns [constant ATTR_WINDOW_CORNER_PREFERENCE].

method.name: get_window_style
method.description: Returns [code]GWL_STYLE[/code] or [code]GWL_EXSTYLE[/code] using [code]GetWindowLongPtrW[/code].

method.name: is_composition_enabled
method.description: Returns whether DWM composition is enabled.

method.name: is_title_bar_coloring_supported
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] on Windows 11 Build 22000 or newer.

method.name: is_window_valid
method.description: Returns whether the Godot window maps to a valid HWND.

method.name: reset_to_default_colors
method.description: Resets caption, text, and border colors to DWM defaults.

method.name: set_border_color
method.description: Sets the native border color.

method.name: set_excluded_from_peek
method.description: Sets [constant ATTR_EXCLUDED_FROM_PEEK].

method.name: set_flip3d_policy
method.description: Sets [constant ATTR_FLIP3D_POLICY].

method.name: set_non_client_rendering_policy
method.description: Sets [constant ATTR_NCRENDERING_POLICY].

method.name: set_peek_disallowed
method.description: Sets [constant ATTR_DISALLOW_PEEK].

method.name: set_systembackdrop_type
method.description: Sets [constant ATTR_SYSTEMBACKDROP_TYPE]. Use [constant MAINWINDOW] for Mica, [constant TRANSIENTWINDOW] for Acrylic, and [constant TABBEDWINDOW] for Mica Alt where supported.

method.name: set_title_bar_color
method.description: Sets the native caption color and automatically chooses black or white caption text. When [param sync_border] is [code]true[/code], the border color is set to the same value.

method.name: set_title_bar_text_color
method.description: Sets the native caption text color.

method.name: set_window_attribute_bool
method.description: Writes a BOOL-sized DWM window attribute.

method.name: set_window_attribute_color
method.description: Writes a COLORREF-sized DWM window attribute.

method.name: set_window_attribute_int
method.description: Writes a DWORD/int-sized DWM window attribute.

method.name: set_window_corner_preference
method.description: Sets [constant ATTR_WINDOW_CORNER_PREFERENCE].

method.name: set_window_style
method.description: Writes [code]GWL_STYLE[/code] or [code]GWL_EXSTYLE[/code] using [code]SetWindowLongPtrW[/code].

method.name: set_window_style_bits
method.description: Enables or disables selected Win32 window style bits without replacing the whole style value.
